maintain.name: Melt Reality
maintain.note: 30 sec Chromatic DoT; while active its periodic damage is replicated to nearby enemies for 20%

procs.name: Incarnation of Chaos
procs.when: on cooldown for burst - instantly resets Chromatic Shard, next cast incurs no cooldown, +15% damage for 15 sec

Infinite.st: Keep Melt Reality's DoT rolling on the target, then hard-cast Chromatic Shard as your main nuke on cooldown (its cast time shortens as Anomaly Spikes proc), spending Mana; use Incarnation of Chaos for burst and Gravity Bomb on cooldown.
Infinite.aoe: Melt Reality replicates 20% of its periodic damage to all nearby enemies, and Gravity Bomb explodes for AoE - keep Melt Reality up on your primary target and use Gravity Bomb when several enemies are grouped.
Infinite.summary: Keep Melt Reality up. ST: Chromatic Shard nuke + Gravity Bomb; burst with Incarnation of Chaos. AoE: Melt Reality cleave + Gravity Bomb.

maintain.name: Accelerated Recovery
maintain.note: 15 sec HoT to keep on allies; Fortify Timeline extends its duration

procs.name: Fortify Timeline
procs.when: on cooldown - AoE heal that also extends Accelerated Recovery on the group

Time.st: Time is a healer/support spec: keep Accelerated Recovery up on allies and heal with Reverse Wound and Correct the Mistake, spending Mana, while using Fortify Timeline and cooldowns as needed; no damage builder/spender loop is derivable from the tooltips.
Time.aoe: Use Correct the Mistake and Fortify Timeline for group healing when multiple allies are hurt.
Time.summary: Support/healer spec: keep Accelerated Recovery up, heal with Reverse Wound / Correct the Mistake, use Fortify Timeline on cooldown.

maintain.name: Paradox Cannon
maintain.note: Continuum spell that generates 1 Echo Fragment every 3 sec; keep it running to build Echo Fragments

Artificer.st: Build Echo Fragments with Paradox Cannon (and Artificer's Wand), then spend them on Shatter Echo (its damage is increased 40% per Echo Fragment consumed), spending Mana.
Artificer.aoe: Spend Echo Fragments on Arc Collision instead, which hits the target plus up to 2 nearby enemies and gains duration per Echo Fragment consumed.
Artificer.summary: Build Echo with Paradox Cannon. ST: Shatter Echo spender. AoE: Arc Collision spender.
